query:
INSERT INTO collateralProjectMatches (collateralId, projectId, matchScore, matchReason)
SELECT ci.id, p.id, 85, CONCAT('Sykes pump range matches ', p.sector, ' dewatering/water management project: ', p.name)
FROM collateralItems ci
JOIN projects p ON (
  p.productLane = 'pumps'
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
)
WHERE ci.id BETWEEN 120001 AND 120007
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM collateralProjectMatches cpm WHERE cpm.collateralId = ci.id AND cpm.projectId = p.id
  )
LIMIT 200;
